category_sources: source_facts.description says (Super) video CD authoring solution; official GNU page calls GNU VCDImager a mastering suite for Video CDs and Super Video CDs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vcdimager; official GNU page and Savannah project use GNU VCDImager.
docs_sources: Official GNU page has a Documentation section and points to the development page for documentation; it identifies vcdimager.org as the development/documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Savannah GNU VCDImager Git Repositories page gives the anonymous clone URL for vcdimager.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list VCD authoring/analyzing tools; official GNU page describes Video CD and Super Video CD authoring, disassembling, analyzing, MPEG stream padding, and XML descriptions.
